Missing Alpaca credentials. Alpaca API credentials required for trading. Setup instructions: 1. Create account at https://alpaca.markets/ 2. Get API keys from dashboard (paper or live) 3. Set environment variables: ALPACA_API_KEY=your_key_here ALPACA_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_here 4. Or add to .env file (see .env.example)
